/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE: 40 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/DAWT/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED THE 40 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/CTORD:PTD IS RELIEVED//CONTPROB/

/977/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 18 M PJ 1D    /CTS 1   /X  PARTIES STIPULATEHAT THE 1 DAY OF COUNTY JAIL CAN BE CONVERTED TO $125,00 AND APPLIED TO THEBASE FINE OF $145,00, LEAVING A BALANCE OF $20,00 BASE FINE/X: PARTIES ALSO STIPULATE THAT THE PENALTIES AND ASSESSMENTS SHALL BE $234,00 NOT $434,00/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $20 PLUS $234 INASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $254/VF2:150/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITIONGIVEN,/DISM3/COMUN: 40 HOURS/X: COMMUNITY SERVICE TO BE MONITORED THROUGHPTD/4019HALF/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD A MISDEMEANOR COUNT4- VC23103 WITHIN THE MEANING OF VC23103,5 IS GRANTED/X: DEFENDANT WAIVESFORMAL READING OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINTAND ADVISEMENT OF RIGHTS/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/JAVS/X:MALINKA WRIGHT BROWN SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR MICHAEL SILVEIRA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM//MVARS/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
